news.t: GRANITESHARES HITS $6 BILLION AUM AS NVDL SURGES

holdings.infoBox: BABX is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are Recv Long Baba Trs Cs1 stock at 81.04%, Baba Equity Swap at 67.94%, Recv Long Baba Trs Wf at 50.98%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 33.37%, and Cash & Cash Equivalents at 21.11%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long BABA Daily ETF (BABX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Alibaba Group Holding Limited stock. BABX was launched on Dec 13, 2022 and is issued by GraniteShares.
infoTable: Alibaba Group Holding Limited - Benchmark Price Return
